text.title: problem-validation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for problem-validation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: LLM-generated interview scripts that re-introduce "would you" / "do you think" question forms.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Script-writer agents default to these polite forms because they appear in most interview templates. Lint every agent-generated script before use; reject any question with "would you" or "do you think".
